nasb.text: Then Ishbi-benob, who was among the descendants of the giant, the weight of whose spear was three hundred shekels of bronze in weight, was girded with a new sword, and he intended to kill David.

esv.text: And Ishbi-benob, one of the descendants of the giants, whose spear weighed three hundred shekels of bronze, and who was armed with a new sword, thought to kill David.

cnv.text: 他們住在歌伯。有一個人，是巨人的兒子，他的銅矛有三公斤半重，又佩帶著新刀；他想要擊殺大衛。

ccb.text: 一个名叫以实·比诺的巨人佩戴新刀，手拿三公斤半重的铜矛，冲上来要杀他。
